title: evolvulus tenuis
intro: Evolvulus tenuis, also known as slender dwarf morning glory or small blue morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus tenuis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support skin health. The herbal preparation of Evolvulus tenuis typically involves drying the leaves and flowers, then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
